app.name: DreamPort
app.subtitle: Convert Apple Watch sleep stages from Apple Health into OSCAR-ready Dreem and ZEO CSV files.
app.title: DreamPort
dialog.about.copyright: Please review any third-party licence requirements before shipping signed builds.
dialog.about.credits: Built with Python, Tkinter, Pillow, and PyInstaller.
dialog.about.summary: Desktop utility for converting Apple Health sleep stage exports into OSCAR-importable Dreem and ZEO CSV files.
dialog.about.supported_formats:
Input: Apple Health export.xml / export.zip
Output: OSCAR Dreem CSV, OSCAR ZEO CSV
dialog.choose_input: Choose an Apple Health export file
dialog.error.generic: An error occurred while converting. Review the log for details.
dialog.error.invalid_input: The input file must be export.xml or export.zip.
dialog.preferences.intro: Keep the main window focussed on file selection and conversion. Detailed language, source, and conversion controls live here.
dialog.restore_defaults.body: Restore every preference to its default value?
dialog.restore_defaults.title: Restore defaults
dialog.supported_formats.body:
Dreem CSV
- Writes OSCAR-compatible Dreem hypnogram files.

ZEO CSV
- Writes OSCAR-compatible ZEO graph files.

You can export either format or both at once without changing the core conversion engine.
engine.summary.title: Apple Watch → OSCAR conversion summary
hint.app_ready: The app is ready. Choose export.xml or export.zip to begin.
hint.compatibility: night-start and night-end remain compatibility inputs so the existing session reconstruction logic stays unchanged.
hint.settings_default: All advanced settings are using their defaults.
option.cluster_gap_hours.description: Maximum empty gap allowed when reconstructing one continuous sleep session.
option.cluster_gap_hours.label: Session merge gap (hours)
option.gap_policy.description: Choose how empty gaps between records should be represented in the hypnogram.
option.gap_policy.label: Gap handling
option.generic_asleep_as.description: Decide how non-stage-specific Asleep records are converted when Apple Health does not provide REM/Core/Deep details.
option.generic_asleep_as.label: Generic Asleep handling
option.incremental_overlap_days.descript: When re-running with a manifest, recent days inside this overlap window are checked again for safety.
option.incremental_overlap_days.label: Incremental overlap days
option.night_end.description: Maintained for compatibility with earlier UI/README behaviour. It is validated but does not override the current cluster-gap-based reconstruction logic.
option.night_end.label: Compatibility night end
option.night_start.description: Maintained for compatibility with earlier UI/README behaviour. It is validated but does not override the current cluster-gap-based reconstruction logic.
option.night_start.label: Compatibility night start
option.output_format.description: Choose which OSCAR-compatible format to create. The underlying session and CSV logic stay exactly the same.
option.output_format.label: Export format
option.prefix.description: Text added to the start of generated filenames. Keeping the default preserves current naming behaviour.
option.prefix.label: Filename prefix
option.rebuild_all.description: Ignore the manifest and regenerate every output file from scratch.
option.rebuild_all.label: Rebuild everything
option.source_contains.description: Only use sleep records whose source name, device, or source family contains this text.
option.source_contains.label: Source filter
option.timezone.description: Choose the timezone used for exported timestamps, or keep it on Auto to follow the system timezone. Labels show a GMT offset and a representative city or region.
option.timezone.label: Timezone
option.ui_language.description: Use the system language automatically, or choose a specific UI language manually.
option.ui_language.label: App language
window.about.title: About DreamPort
window.error.title: Error
window.preferences.title: Preferences
window.success.title: Conversion Complete
window.supported_formats.title: Supported Formats
